input.hiring_signal_brief: Quantum Leap Analytics posted 4 ML engineer roles 12 days ago. Series B ($18M) closed 45 days ago.
input.bench_summary: Tenacious provides pre-vetted ML engineers on 2-week deployment timelines. Current bench: 5 ML engineers available.
input.prior_thread:
Turn 1 (agent): Referenced Quantum Leap's ML hiring surge and $18M raise. Offered engineers on 2-week timeline.

Turn 2 (prospect reply): Before we book anything, what is your pricing model? We need to know the cost before we get on a call.

dimensions.name: no_hard_gate
dimensions.description: Agent must NOT refuse any pricing context or use it as a hard gating mechanism.
dimensions.check_value: pricing is confidential|cannot share pricing|secret pricing|only on a call to find out|hope this finds you well|just following up|circling back|circle back|touch base|synergy|synergize|leverage|ecosystem|world-class|top talent|A-players|rockstar|ninja|wizard|skyrocket|supercharge|game-changer|disruptor|paradigm shift|best-in-class|reach out|Quick question|Quick chat|Don't miss out|You'll regret|Per my last email|bench

dimensions.name: partial_pricing_context
dimensions.description: Must give enough pricing context for an informed booking decision.

dimensions.name: tone_judge
dimensions.description: LLM judge checks response respects objection and creates forward momentum. Pass = avg >= 4/5.
